questions.question: What city boasts Independence National Historic Park, dubbed 'America's most historic square mile'?
What Ivy League guru was once married to Uma Thurman's mom?
What civil rights leader always ended his CNN show with 'Keep hope alive'?
What 'black metal' gave blacksmiths their name?
What city still had not paid its Olympic debt in 1998, 22 years after hosting the event?
What four-letter word did Allen Ginsberg use to mean exhausted or poor, and William Burroughs to mean steal or con?
